revised

Dear Ms. Ehsan, Hope you're doing well

 

Could you please schedule a meeting between Engr. Osama and Dr. Hossam to discuss the following topics :

 

·         Electronic IMC Services Advertising

·         Ambulance Transportation Services

 

 

Thank you,

and looking forward to hearing from you soon.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
anoter revised

Hello Ms. Ehsan,

I hope this email finds you well. Could you kindly arrange a meeting between Engr. Osama and Dr. Hossam to discuss Electronic IMC Services Advertising and Ambulance Transportation Services? 

Your assistance with scheduling this meeting would be greatly appreciated. Thank you for your time and I look forward to hearing back from you.

Best regards,

[Your Name]

subject for this email below

Dear Ms. Ehsan
Hope you're doing well

Could you please schedule a meeting between Engr. Osama and Dr. Hossam to discuss the following topics :

•	Electronic IMC Services Advertising
•	Ambulance Transportation Services
 

Thank you,
Request for Meeting: Electronic IMC Services Advertising and Ambulance Transportation Services Discussion

Schedule a Meeting to Discuss Electronic IMC Services Advertising and Ambulance Transportation Services with Engr. Osama and Dr. Hossam

revised this sentence

Redesign IMC Network IVR (920027778)
And Activate "Ambulance Transportation Services " At The Beginning Of Main Menu
Revamp the IMC Network's IVR (920027778) and activate "Ambulance Transportation Services" at the start of the main menu.
another
Please redesign the IVR for the IMC Network by adding "Ambulance Transportation Services" to the beginning of the main menu.

Provide the Cisco License to ensure the Calls are recorded
 & performances are monitored
Please provide the necessary Cisco license to enable call recording and performance monitoring.

Ensure patient eligibility for
 "Ambulance Transportation Services “
While waiting in all IMC Network IVR
Please ensure that patient eligibility for "Ambulance Transportation Services" is verified while they are on hold in all IMC Network IVR systems.
another
Kindly implement a procedure to verify patient eligibility for "Ambulance Transportation Services" while they are waiting in the queue of all IMC Network IVR systems.
Hearing patients for ambulance services while waiting for their calls to be answered in the general automated answering machine
Please set up a system where patients calling for ambulance services can be heard while waiting for their calls to be answered in the general automated answering machine.

revised this sentence

Hearing patients for ambulance services while waiting for their calls to be answered in the general automated answering machine
Please ensure that patients calling for ambulance services can be heard while they are on hold in the general automated answering machine.
سماع المرضى لخدمات النقل الإسعافي أثناء الإنتظار للرد على مكالماتهم في عموم الرد الآلي
يرجى التأكد من إمكانية سماع المرضى الذين يتصلون لطلب خدمات النقل الإسعافي أثناء انتظارهم في الرد الآلي العام.

revised this sentence

Covering calls-load of "Ambulance Transportation Services “ and Running phone extension 24/7
Please ensure that the "Ambulance Transportation Services" calls are covered during peak hours and that the phone extension runs 24/7.
Determining the required workforce size to cover 24/7 ambulance transportation service calls.
Please determine the necessary workforce size to provide 24/7 coverage for ambulance transportation service calls.
Training employees to use the Cisco system and how to deal with it
Please provide training to employees on how to use the Cisco system and how to effectively handle calls using it.
Calls are forwarded Directly after 10 sec. to a determined bravo Number
Please set up the system to forward calls directly to the designated Bravo number after 10 seconds.

IMC Network Unified Number
920027778
To avail IMC Network's services or assistance, please contact us at our unified number 920027778. We look forward to assisting you.

revised

Patient Call 
IMC Network Unified Number
920027778
To contact IMC Network for medical assistance or services, please dial our unified number 920027778. Our team is ready to help you.
Patient Call  IMC Network Unified Number 920027778
To speak with an IMC Network representative for medical assistance or services, please call our unified number at 920027778. We are available to assist you.

revised sentence

Work Process
Can you please provide more context or information about what you would like me to revise in the sentence?
Customer complaints is it good catch
I'm sorry I'm not sure what you are asking me to revise. Can you clarify?
is dealing with customer complaints as a good catch

I believe you are asking if handling customer complaints is a good thing to do. In this case, "good catch" may not be the most appropriate phrase to use. Instead, you could reframe the sentence to say:

"Dealing with customer complaints is an essential part of providing good customer service."
رسالة ترحيب للإرتباط بشخص عبر اللنكد ان

مرحبًا [الاسم المُعَنِّى]،

أتمنى أن تكون بخير. شكرًا لاتصالك بي عبر لينكد إن.

أتطلع إلى العمل معك والتعرف على خبراتك ومساهماتك في مجال [المجال الذي تعمل فيه].

يرجى عدم التردد في الاتصال بي إذا كان لديك أي أسئلة أو احتياجات مستقبلية.

مرة أخرى، أشكرك على اتصالك واتطلع إلى التحدث معك قريبًا.

أطيب التحيات،
[اسمك]
رسالة مختصرة

مرحبًا،

شكرًا للاتصال عبر لينكد إن. أتطلع إلى التعاون معك ومعرفة المزيد عن خبراتك. لا تتردد في الاتصال بي إذا كان لديك أي متطلبات أو أسئلة.

شكرًا لوقتك،

[اسمك]
